items.display_answer: A: Moi rodzice mieszkają w Indiach. Są już bardzo starsi.
items.reference_question: Q: Where do your parents live?
items.reference_answer: A: My parents live in India. They are very old.

items.translation_text: How many siblings do you have?
items.original_reference_text: How many siblings do you have?
items.display_answer: A: Mam trzy siostry i dwóch braci, to duża rodzina.
items.reference_question: Q: How many siblings do you have?
items.reference_answer: A: I have 3 sisters and 2 brothers, a big family.
